## Testing

## Checklist
- [ ] Class files are in `Classes/<ClassName>/`
- [ ] TOC updated (new files BEFORE Config.lua)
- [ ] DESIGN.md updated (if new patterns introduced)
- [ ] README.md updated (if new class/spec added)
